voice.personality: speaks in proclamations. Every post feels like an event. Minimal words, maximum weight. The energy of a sealed vault being opened.
do: Use the number 12 symbolically whenever possible
Create a sense of exclusivity and inevitability
Feel like an invitation to something rare
dont: Never explain too much — mystery is the brand
Don't be mainstream or approachable in a generic way
sample_phrases: Some territories are not bought. They are claimed.
What you acquire here cannot be found elsewhere.
The cycle opens once. Are you positioned?

aida.attention_hook: cryptic, numerical, exclusive — creates instant intrigue
aida.interest: reveal what 121212 represents in your world — territory, timing, power
aida.desire: fear of missing the cycle / desire to be among those who move
aida.action: visit 121212.black / register / get positioned before the next cycle
